summary: Verified all logo and hero image display features are working: 1) Logo displays in header from agency settings, 2) Logo displays in footer from agency settings, 3) Hero image from admin shows on homepage, 4) Marca y Logo section has logo upload functionality, 5) Marca y Logo section has hero image upload with option to add multiple images.
passed_tests: Frontend: Logo visible in header - uses agency.logo_url from settings
Frontend: Logo visible in footer - uses agency.logo_url with data-testid='footer-logo'
Frontend: Hero image from admin displays on homepage as background
Frontend: Hero image auto-rotates if multiple images configured (every 5 seconds)
Frontend: Hero image indicators shown at bottom when multiple images exist
Admin: 'Marca y Logo' tab accessible after login with admin/admin123
Admin: Logo upload section 'Logo de la Agencia' visible with 'Subir Logo' button
Admin: Hero images section 'Imágenes de Portada (Hero)' visible with '+' button to add images
Admin: Current logo preview shown in Marca y Logo section
Admin: Current hero image preview shown in Marca y Logo section
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing admin configuration
context_for_next_testing_agent: All logo and hero image features verified working: 1) Header and Footer both display logo from agency?.logo_url, 2) HomePage uses agency?.hero_images array for hero background with auto-rotation for multiple images, 3) Admin 'Marca y Logo' tab has both logo upload and hero image upload sections working correctly.

features_verified.logo_in_header: VERIFIED - Logo displays in Header.jsx from agency.logo_url
features_verified.logo_in_footer: VERIFIED - Logo displays in Footer.jsx from agency.logo_url with data-testid='footer-logo'
features_verified.hero_image_from_admin: VERIFIED - HomePage.jsx uses agency.hero_images for hero section background
features_verified.logo_upload_in_admin: VERIFIED - 'Subir Logo' button in Marca y Logo section
features_verified.hero_upload_in_admin: VERIFIED - 'Imágenes de Portada (Hero)' section with '+' add button
